ham.subject: Your Bank Alert: Recent Transaction Monitored
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

We are writing to confirm that a transaction of $1,234.56 was made on your account ending in 5678 on 2026-04-10 at 14:32:07.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our fraud department immediately at 1-800-123-4567 or visit <URL> to review your account activity.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best regards,
Your Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: FedEx Delivery Issue – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking #123456789) was not delivered due to an outstanding missed delivery fee. As a result, the package has been held at our local facility.

To avoid further delay and potential additional charges, please complete the payment within the next 24 hours. Failure to do so will result in the cancellation of the shipment and the loss of the item.

Click here to pay: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Support
